description_long: This is a classic wooden chessboard set up for play, featuring a square board with alternating light and dark squares and a full set of chess pieces in two contrasting colors. The board is bordered by a dark wooden frame, and the playing surface is marked with alphanumeric coordinates along the edges for easy reference. The chess pieces are traditional Staunton-style, with the light pieces in a pale wood tone and the dark pieces in a deep, almost black wood. The board and pieces have a smooth, polished finish, giving them a refined and elegant appearance. The overall construction appears sturdy, with the chessboard lying flat and the pieces standing upright and well-proportioned.
description: A polished wooden chessboard with a full set of classic Staunton-style chess pieces in light and dark wood, bordered by a dark wooden frame with alphanumeric markings.
description_view_0: The chessboard is viewed from the black side, showing all black pieces in the foreground and white pieces in the background, with the board's alphanumeric markings visible along the near and left edges.
description_view_1: The board is seen from the white side, with all white pieces in the foreground and black pieces in the background, and the alphanumeric markings visible along the near and left edges.
description_view_2: This angle shows the black pieces in the foreground and the white pieces in the background, with the board's right and near edges displaying the alphanumeric coordinates.
description_view_3: The chessboard is viewed from the left side, with white pieces on the left and black pieces on the right, and the alphanumeric markings visible along the near and right edges.
attribute_board_pattern: The playing surface features an 8x8 grid of perfectly square tiles arranged in a checkerboard pattern, alternating between light and dark wood tones. Each square is uniform in size, and the grid is bordered by a wide, dark wooden frame. The outer edge of the board is marked with alphanumeric coordinates (letters and numbers) for each row and column, aiding in move notation. The overall design is classic and functional, with no additional decorative elements beyond the polished wood grain.
attribute_border_design: The border is a wide, dark wooden frame that surrounds the entire playing area, featuring a smooth, polished finish. Along the inner edge of the border, alphanumeric coordinates are inscribed in a light color, marking each row and column. The border is simple and unornamented, emphasizing the natural wood grain and providing a clear visual separation from the playing squares.
